titlStmt.titl: AUTNES Comparative Study of Electoral Systems Post-Election Survey 2017 (CSES Edition, OA edition)

citation.biblCit: Aichholzer, Julian; Kritzinger, Sylvia; Wagner, Markus; Berk, Nicolai; Boomgaarden, Hajo; Müller, Wolfgang C., 2018, "AUTNES Comparative Study of Electoral Systems Post-Election Survey 2017 (CSES Edition, OA edition)", https://doi.org/10.11587/W193UZ, AUSSDA, V4, UNF:6:XZ6B7FsjGdiGzmuYYM+kkA== [fileUNF]

titlStmt.titl: AUTNES Comparative Study of Electoral Systems Post-Election Survey 2017 (CSES Edition, OA edition)

grantNo.agency: Federal Ministry of Science, Research and Economy
Anniversary Fund of the Oesterreichische Nationalbank (Austrian Central Bank)

distStmt.distrbtr: The Austrian Social Science Data Archive

contact.affiliation: The Austrian Social Science Data Archive

stdyInfo.abstract:
Reduced edition for public use. Full edition available for scientific use. This is Open Access data based on the Comparative Study of Electoral Systems (CSES) Module 5 and focuses on the Austrian National Parliamentary Election held on 15 October 2017. This survey is part of the Austrian National Election Study (AUTNES).
You can find the CSES cross country data set and the english questionnaire for module 5 on the CSES Website.

sumDscr.universe: The population universe comprises eligible voters for the Austrian Parliamentary Election on 15 October 2017 (Austrian citizens, aged 16 years and older at election day).

othrStdyMat.relStdy: Aichholzer, Julian; Kritzinger, Sylvia; Wagner, Markus; Berk, Nicolai; Boomgaarden, Hajo; Müller, Wolfgang C., 2018, "AUTNES Comparative Study of Electoral Systems Post-Election Survey 2017 (SUF edition)", https://doi.org/10.11587/IMKDZI, AUSSDA.

fileDscr.notes: Core data file - STATA format - 85 Variables, 1203 Observations
Variable identifiers and descriptions - machine-readable English

var.name: A1
var.labl: ID COMPONENT - RESPONDENT WITHIN ELECTION STUDY

catgry.labl: MARRIED OR LIVING TOGETHER AS MARRIED
R IS MEMBER OF A UNION
R IS NOT MEMBER OF A UNION
EMPLOYED - FULL TIME (32 OR MORE HOURS WEEKLY)
EMPLOYED - PART TIME (15 TO LESS THAN 32 HOURS WEEKLY)
STUDENT, IN SCHOOL, IN VOCATIONAL TRAINING
ONCE A WEEK/MORE THAN ONCE A WEEK
TWO TO ELEVEN TIMES A YEAR
TWO OR MORE TIMES A MONTH

var.name: D15
var.labl: WAS EITHER BIOLOGICAL PARENT BORN OUTSIDE OF THE COUNTRY

catgry.labl: SUBURBS OF LARGE TOWN OR CITY

var.name: Q04b
var.labl: ATTITUDES ABOUT ELITES: DO NOT CARE ABOUT THE PEOPLE

var.name: Q04d
var.labl: ATTITUDES ABOUT ELITES: ARE THE MAIN PROBLEM

var.name: Q04e
var.labl: ATTITUDES ABOUT ELITES: STRONG LEADER BENDS THE RULES

var.name: Q04f
var.labl: ATTITUDES ABOUT ELITES: PEOPLE SHOULD MAKE POLICY DECISIONS

var.name: Q04g
var.labl: ATTITUDES ABOUT ELITES: RICH AND POWERFUL

var.name: Q05a
var.labl: OUT-GROUP ATTITUDES: MINORITIES - CUSTOMS AND TRADITIONS

var.name: Q05b
var.labl: OUT-GROUP ATTITUDES: MINORITIES - WILL OF THE MAJORITY

var.name: Q05c
var.labl: OUT-GROUP ATTITUDES: IMMIGRANTS GOOD FOR ECONOMY

var.name: Q05d
var.labl: OUT-GROUP ATTITUDES: CULTURE HARMED BY IMMIGRANTS

var.name: Q06a
var.labl: NATIONAL IDENTITY: TO HAVE BEEN BORN IN COUNTRY

var.name: Q06c
var.labl: NATIONAL IDENTITY: TO BE ABLE TO SPEAK COUNTRY LANGUAGES

var.name: Q06d
var.labl: NATIONAL IDENTITY: TO FOLLOW CUSTOMS AND TRADITIONS COUNTRY

var.name: Q08
var.labl: GOVERNMENT ACTION - DIFFERENCES IN INCOME LEVELS

var.name: Q10a
var.labl: IS THERE A PARTY THAT REPRESENTS RESPONDENT'S VIEWS

var.name: Q10b
var.labl: PARTY THAT REPRESENTS RESPONDENT'S VIEWS BEST

var.name: Q12LH_a
var.labl: CURRENT LOWER HOUSE ELECTION: DID RESPONDENT CAST A BALLOT

catgry.labl: RESPONDENT DID NOT CAST A BALLOT

var.name: Q12LH_b
var.labl: CURRENT LOWER HOUSE ELECTION: VOTE CHOICE - PARTY LIST

var.name: Q12LH_d
var.labl: CURRENT LOWER HOUSE ELECTION: DID RESPONDENT CAST CANDIDATE PREFERENCE VOTE

catgry.labl: RESPONDENT DID NOT EXERCISE CANDIDATE PREFERENCE

var.name: Q13a
var.labl: PREVIOUS ELECTION: DID RESPONDENT CAST A BALLOT

catgry.labl: VOLUNTEERED: NOT ELIGIBLE TO VOTE IN LAST ELECTION
RESPONDENT DID NOT CAST A BALLOT

var.name: Q13b
var.labl: PREVIOUS ELECTION: VOTE CHOICE - PARTY LIST

var.name: Q14a
var.labl: WHO IS IN POWER CAN MAKE A BIG DIFFERENCE

catgry.labl: IT MAKES A BIG DIFFERENCE WHO IS IN POWER
IT DOESN'T MAKE ANY DIFFERENCE WHO IS IN POWER

var.name: Q14b
var.labl: WHO PEOPLE VOTE FOR MAKES A BIG DIFFERENCE

catgry.labl: WHO PEOPLE VOTE FOR WON'T MAKE ANY DIFFERENCE
WHO PEOPLE VOTE FOR CAN MAKE A BIG DIFFERENCE
DON'T KNOW ENOUGH ABOUT/DON'T KNOW WHERE TO RATE
DON'T KNOW ENOUGH ABOUT/DON'T KNOW WHERE TO RATE
DON'T KNOW ENOUGH ABOUT/DON'T KNOW WHERE TO RATE
DON'T KNOW ENOUGH ABOUT/DON'T KNOW WHERE TO RATE
DON'T KNOW ENOUGH ABOUT/DON'T KNOW WHERE TO RATE
DON'T KNOW ENOUGH ABOUT/DON'T KNOW WHERE TO RATE
DON'T KNOW ENOUGH ABOUT/DON'T KNOW WHERE TO RATE
DON'T KNOW ENOUGH ABOUT/DON'T KNOW WHERE TO RATE
DON'T KNOW ENOUGH ABOUT/DON'T KNOW WHERE TO RATE
DON'T KNOW ENOUGH ABOUT/DON'T KNOW WHERE TO RATE
DON'T KNOW ENOUGH ABOUT/DON'T KNOW WHERE TO RATE
DON'T KNOW ENOUGH ABOUT/DON'T KNOW WHERE TO RATE

var.name: Q22a
var.labl: ARE YOU CLOSE TO ANY POLITICAL PARTY

var.name: Q22b
var.labl: DO YOU FEEL CLOSER TO ONE PARTY

var.name: Q22c
var.labl: WHICH PARTY DO YOU FEEL CLOSEST TO

var.name: Q22d
var.labl: DEGREE OF CLOSENESS TO THIS PARTY

otherMat.txt: Core data file - compressed SPSS format - 85 Variables, 1203 Observations
